Security tip: Recommended Study Timeline

Plan for approximately 8-10 weeks of dedicated study. Here is a suggested weekly breakdown: Week 1: Domain 1: AI Fundamentals — AI types, ML techniques, transformers, GANs, supervised/unsupervised/rei...

- Week 1: Domain 1: AI Fundamentals — AI types, ML techniques, transformers, GANs,
- Week 2: Domain 1: AI Data & Lifecycle — Data processing, RAG, vector embeddings,
- Week 3: Domain 2: Threat Modeling — OWASP LLM Top 10, MITRE ATLAS, MIT AI Risk R
- Week 4: Domain 2: AI Security Controls — Prompt firewalls, guardrails, rate/toke
